query:
ALTER TABLE ai_reels 
ADD COLUMN hook TEXT AFTER script,
ADD COLUMN caption TEXT AFTER hook,
ADD COLUMN shotstackRenderUrl TEXT AFTER caption,
ADD COLUMN shotstackRenderId VARCHAR(255) AFTER shotstackRenderUrl,
ADD COLUMN reelType ENUM('did_avatar', 'authority_reel') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'did_avatar' AFTER duration,
MODIFY COLUMN didVideoUrl TEXT NULL,
MODIFY COLUMN avatarUrl TEXT NULL,
MODIFY COLUMN voiceId VARCHAR(100) NULL;
